class.description: efinicion de interfaz de entrada de tipo uno
class.name: ENTRADA

method.name: ImportarVariables
method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

method.name: ImportarArchivo
method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

method.name: SincronizarPagina
method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

method.name: Clean
method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom from PER01_PERSONAL,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP join PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal inner PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ join LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp inner PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_dato, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable, T.used from LIQ09_VARIABLES, (select LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_variable, 1 as used from LIQ14_CONCEPTOS,LIQ14_CONC_VAR where LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.l_activo=1 and LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto=LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_concepto group by LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_variable) as T join T.oi_variable right outer LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable where LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <row oi_empresa="164" oi_liquidacion="" LEG="21" VAR="aa_sret" VMD="4" PER="201009" />
resource.name: getValor

qry:select.name: FijaEmpresa
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.oi_variable, LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.n_valor from LIQ15_VAL_VARGF, LIQ09_VARIABLES where LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadEmpresa
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.oi_variable, LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.n_valor from LIQ19_VAL_VARGN, LIQ09_VARIABLES where LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadEmpleado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.n_valor from LIQ25_VAL_VAREN, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES where LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_personal_liq=LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp=PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NovedadPeriEmpleado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.n_valor from LIQ25_VAL_VARPN, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES where LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_personal_liq=LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp=PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} and LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.e_periodo={#PARAM:@PER} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FijoEmpleado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_variable, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.n_valor from LIQ07_VAL_VAREF, LIQ09_VARIABLES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP where LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_personal_emp=PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: AcumEmpleado
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_variable, LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.n_valor from LIQ07_VAL_VAREA, LIQ09_VARIABLES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP where LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_personal_emp=PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: AcumPeriEmpleado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_variable, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.n_valor from LIQ07_VAL_VARPA, LIQ09_VARIABLES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP where LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_variable=LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable and LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_personal_emp=PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#PARAM:@LEG} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable={#PARAM:@VAR} and LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.e_periodo={#PARAM:@PER} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_dato, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable, T.used from LIQ09_VARIABLES, (select LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_variable, 1 as used from LIQ14_CONCEPTOS,LIQ14_CONC_VAR where LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.l_activo=1 and LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto=LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_concepto group by LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_variable) as T join T.oi_variable right outer LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ where LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.name: CargarVariables
method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.n_valor as VAL from LIQ09_VARIABLES, LIQ15_VAL_VARGF(LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.oi_empresa={%=#PARAM:@oi_empresa %}) join LIQ15_VAL_VARGF.oi_variable right outer LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable where LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable=\'4\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.n_valor as VAL from LIQ09_VARIABLES, LIQ19_VAL_VARGN(LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.oi_liquidacion={%=#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion%}) join LIQ19_VAL_VARGN.oi_variable right outer LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable where LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable=\'2\' ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PAGE gcustom="" VAR="430" MOD="FI" VAL="2.0" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="2" legajo_hasta="3" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID=""> <PERSONAS> <ROW VALUES="11462,11465" /> </PERSONAS> </PAGE>
resource.name: LOAD_FL

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as LEG, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, TMPVALUES.n_valor as VAL, TMPVALUES.e_periodo as PER from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ( select LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.n_valor, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.e_periodo from LIQ07_VAL_VAREF where LIQ07_VAL_VAREF.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ) as TMPVALUES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer TMPVALUES.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES %}) and LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PAGE gcustom="" VAR="430" MOD="FI" VAL="2.0" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="2" legajo_hasta="3" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID=""> <PERSONAS> <ROW VALUES="11462,11465" /> </PERSONAS> </PAGE>
resource.name: LOAD_AL

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as LEG, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, TMPVALUES.n_valor as VAL from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ( select LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.n_valor from LIQ07_VAL_VAREA where LIQ07_VAL_VAREA.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ) as TMPVALUES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer TMPVALUES.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES %}) and LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PAGE gcustom="" VAR="685" MOD="FI" VAL="10.0" PER_DES="200910" PER_HAS="201002" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="1" legajo_hasta="10" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID=""><PERSONAS><ROW VALUES="11462,11465,11466,11471,11496" /></PERSONAS></PAGE>
resource.name: LOAD_APL

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as LEG, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, TMPVALUES.n_valor as VAL from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ( select LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.n_valor from LIQ07_VAL_VARPA where LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} and LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.e_periodo={%=#ROWS:@PER %} ) as TMPVALUES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer TMPVALUES.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES %}) and LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in secuence('INT,{%=string(floor(#PARAMIN:@PER_DES div 100)*12+#PARAMIN:@PER_DES mod 100-1) %},{%=string(floor(#PARAMIN:@PER_HAS div 100)*12+#PARAMIN:@PER_HAS mod 100-1) %},1')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PAGE VAR="430" oi_empresa="164" oi_liquidacion="121" gcustom="" MOD="FI" VAL="3.0" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="" legajo_hasta="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID=""><PERSONAS><ROW VALUES="11462,11465,11466,11471,11496,11497,11498,11499,11500,11501,11502,11503,11504,11505,11506,11509,11464,11511,11513,11514,11554,11470,11467,11468,11469,11510" /></PERSONAS></PAGE>
resource.name: LOAD_NL

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as LEG, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, TMPVALUES.n_valor as VAL from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ( select LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.n_valor from LIQ25_VAL_VAREN, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ join LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_personal_liq inner LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq where LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion %} and LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ) as TMPVALUES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer TMPVALUES.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES %}) and LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <PAGE PER="201012" VAR="430" oi_empresa="164" oi_liquidacion="121" gcustom="" MOD="FI" VAL="3.0" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="" legajo_hasta="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" legID=""><PERSONAS><ROW VALUES="11462,11465,11466,11471,11496,11497,11498,11499,11500,11501,11502,11503,11504,11505,11506,11509,11464,11511,11513,11514,11554,11470,11467,11468,11469,11510" /></PERSONAS></PAGE>
resource.name: LOAD_NLR

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as LEG, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable as VAR, TMPVALUES.n_valor as VAL from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ09_VARIABLES, ( select LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.n_valor from LIQ25_VAL_VARPN, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ join LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_personal_liq inner LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq where LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion %} and LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.e_periodo={%=#PARAMIN:@PER %} and LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ) as TMPVALUES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer TMPVALUES.oi_personal_emp where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@VALUES %}) and LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable={%=#PARAMIN:@VAR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in INTERFACE('GET_PTR:Valores.txt')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in INTERFACE('GET_LINE:Valores.txt:{%=#PARAM:@id %}')/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_documento, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom from PER01_PERSONAL,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP join PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal inner PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW
